title: Market Summarizer Role Work
summary: Reusable wrkstrm-finance workstream template for market-summary delivery work previously embedded in Tau agenda milestones.
instructions: Use this template when instantiating concrete Market Summarizer work.
Keep summary artifacts, source data, and governance exports linked from the instantiated workstream or thread.
Do not treat this reusable template as evidence that a summary was produced.
outcomes: Daily and periodic market summaries have traceable inputs and archived outputs.
Sector, IV, unusual-flow, and governance trend reporting has a reusable execution path.

tasks.text: Publish daily EOD summaries; archive MD/JSON to governance store.
Integrate unusual flow and IV shift analytics; sector heatmap.
Automated governance trends and DocC exports.
Baseline summary template and sector/IV/UOA sections.
Multi-tenant summaries by sleeve/entity and automated governance reports.
Automated periodic governance packs and entity-level roll-ups.
Cross-project semantic graph with lineage and provenance.
